# NorthBridge

> NorthBridge is an AI business automation company for small businesses. It builds and maintains automation workflows, led by an automated payment-chasing system, plus AI client communication and AI fluency training, in English and Spanish, for clients in the United States and Latin America.

## What NorthBridge does

- Payment chasing automation: checks who has paid, automatically reminds late clients, notifies the team. Flagship product. $99/month pilot, no setup fee, 30-day money-back guarantee.
- Cinderella (data & workflows): cleans data, automates back-office workflows in the client's own n8n account.
- Hermes (client communication): follow-up sequences, instant AI messaging, AI voice agents.
- Socrates (AI training): team workshops and custom curricula so businesses actually adopt AI tools.

## How it works

The NorthBridge Cycle: Diagnose (2–3 days) → Build (3–7 days) → Educate & Train (1 session), repeating quarterly. Clients own their n8n accounts and their workflows. Maximum 3 new clients onboarded per month.

## Pricing

- Pilot: $99/month, 90 days, money-back guarantee in the first 30 days
- Starter bundle: $299/month
- Growth bundle: $649/month
- Scale bundle: $699/month

## Contact

- Email: northbridgeai1@gmail.com
- Founder: Pierce Tyrrell
- Languages: English, Spanish
